prose:
**Pyridine frontier-orbital analysis (HOMO–LUMO gap)** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**), computed in **PySCF**. **Gas phase** (no solvent model; solvent = null). Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet, RKS). Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`, 11 atoms — C5H5N); the DFT was a single point at this fixed geometry (not re-optimized). Density fitting (RI) is on by default in chemkit and is an approximation to the two-electron integrals. SCF converged in 10 cycles.

**Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital-energy gap, not an excitation energy).

Supporting frontier-orbital values (eV):
- HOMO (index 20) = −7.2525992
- LUMO (index 21) = −1.112786
- HOMO−1 = −7.4731156, HOMO−2 = −8.0425195
- LUMO+1 = −0.67231536, LUMO+2 = +1.1781069

Koopmans-derived quantities (eV, from HOMO/LUMO): vertical IP = 7.2525992, vertical EA = 1.112786, electronegativity = 4.1826926, chemical hardness = 3.0699066, chemical softness = 0.32574281 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 2.8494218.

Total electronic energy: −248.3782 Ha (= −6758.7152 eV = −155859.68 kcal/mol); energy zero = electronic energy (bare nuclei + electrons). Note: this is a B3LYP/def2-TZVP electronic energy and is only comparable to other same-method, same-basis energies.

**Integrity:** the engine reported status "ok" and **trustworthy: true**. All integrity checks passed (energy_finite ✓, scf_converged ✓, schema_header ✓, schema_headline ✓).

**Warnings:** the result JSON contained **no warnings** (no `warnings` array / none reported) — a clean run.

**Reproducibility:** command — `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpl80n8enq/live.json`. Result JSON written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpl80n8enq/live.json`. (No live `.out` log path was surfaced by this tool invocation; the engine wrote its result to the `--out` JSON path above.)

No experimental/literature comparison is offered — ask if you want one and I will verify a source first.
